creator: adsh@univ.kiev.ua
text:
I get FreeBSD 7.2/8.2/9.0 RELEASES i386 boot GENERIC (or custom) kernel errors on Intel D815E(P)FV motherboard.

With ACPI:

acpi0: reservation of 0, a0000 (3) failed
acpi0: reservation of 100000, fe00000 (3) failed

Without ACPI:

unknown: <PNP0c01> can't assign resources (memory)
unknown: <PNP0c01> can't assign resources (memory)

I have NO any kernel boot errors on FreeBSD 6.4 GENERIC (or custom) kernel.

See attached examples.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Boot with FreeBSD 7.2/8.2/9.0 RELEASES i386 CD.
